title: Tower PT20055WHT Presto 2 Slice Toaster, White
features: POWERFUL TOASTER: The Tower Presto Two Slice 750W Toaster can toast 2 slices at once quicker than a standard 500W alternative
VARIABLE BROWNING LEVELS: The easy-to-adjust control lets you enjoy toast to your taste every breakfast time
DEFROST, HEAT AND CANCEL: Have more control over your toasting needs with the defrost, heat and cancel functions
EVEN TOASTING: Self-centring function for even toasting on both sides and automatic turn-off protects against burnt toast and other delicacies
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and a 1 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Enjoy a great round of toast, a bagel or muffin with this Tower Presto 2 slice toaster This 2 slice toaster features seven different browning settings and a self-centering function. You can also toast straight from frozen thanks to the defrost function. This toaster includes a removable crumb tray that collects all the excess crumbs to then be easily disposed of, while the integrated cord storage helps keep your kitchen countertop neat and tidy. 750W Toaster can toast 2 slices at once quicker than a standard 500W alternative An adjustable dial with 7 settings for browning control Defrost, reheat and cancel buttons for maximum versatility Self-centring function for even toasting on both sides and automatic turn-off protects against burnt toast and other delicacies Removable crumb tray makes the toaster easy to clean and maintain Non-slip feet for added stability and 81cm cable and handy cord storage
